case_title: VISIT TAVEETHAMCHAROEN VS. JUAN MORAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $55.00 SERVED NOV-18-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, JUAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT JUAN MORAN WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAVEETHAMCHAROEN, VISIT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MORAN, JUAN MORAN, PABLO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
